top_signals.title: The Oil Shock Is Weakening India’s Economy and Finances
top_signals.summary: India is scrambling to contain the economic and financial impact of the worst oil supply disruption in history as analysts say the high oil prices would continue to weigh on the Indian currency, economic growth, and public finances as long as supply is choked at the Strait of Hormuz. More than three months after the Iran war began, investment banks, brokerages, rating agencies, and even India’s central bank are lowering economic growth forecasts, while the government intervenes to stop the cash bleed from the balance of payments that has…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Intesa’s Messina Braces for Bidding War Over Monte Paschi
top_signals.summary: Intesa Sanpaolo SpA Chief Executive Officer Carlo Messina signaled he’s prepared to address any counterbids for Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, after unveiling an offer that valued the world’s oldest bank at more than €30 billion ($35 billion).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: USDT's flashing a golden cross and that may be bad news for bitcoin
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Why ERG’s King’s Award matters for industrial air pollution control
top_signals.summary: Few industries have benefited more from tightening environmental regulation than industrial air pollution control. Across wastewater treatment, chemical manufacturing, pharmaceuticals, industrial processing and waste management, operators are facing increasing pressure to reduce emissions, manage odours and demonstrate environmental compliance. What was once viewed as a technical challenge is increasingly becoming a boardroom issue, influencing investment [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bond Backed by French SME Loans Looks to Open a New Debt Market
top_signals.summary: French state-backed lender Bpifrance SACA is selling a new type of bond backed by small company loans, looking to end a more than decade-long regulatory impasse over European Secured Notes.
